title: Viners Savannah 42 Piece Stainless Steel Cutlery Canteen Set for 6 Place Settings
features: Add that special finishing touch to any table setting with the Viners Savannah 42 Piece Canteen Cutlery Set
Featuring a contemporary tear drop shape, the contoured handles provide optimum comfort during use
The set includes 6 x dessert forks, 6 x table forks, 6 x dessert knives, 6 x table knives, 6 x dessert spoons, 6 x soup spoons & 6 x tea spoons
The cutlery is made from the finest quality 18.0 stainless steel making the set perfect for entertaining and everyday use
This set contains all you need for a table setting for six people and is dishwasher safe
description: Add that special finishing touch to any table setting with the Viners Savannah 42 Piece Canteen Cutlery Set. Featuring a contemporary tear drop shape, the contoured handles provide optimum comfort during use. This set contains all you need for a table setting for six people. The set includes 6 x dessert forks, 6 x table forks, 6 x dessert knives, 6 x table knives, 6 x dessert spoons, 6 x soup spoons & 6 x tea spoons. The cutlery is made from the finest quality 18.0 stainless steel making the set perfect for entertaining and everyday use. Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage, delivering excellence - elegant, robust cutlery that comes with a 25 year guarantee. Set comes in a smart wooden case.
